headline: KLA Ramps Up Buybacks And Dividend As China Export Risks Loom
summary: KLA Corporation (NasdaqGS:KLAC) announced a new $7b share buyback program. The company approved a 21% increase to its regular dividend. These capital return moves arrive as AI related chip demand supports equipment orders. At the same time, new bipartisan US legislation could tighten export rules for chipmaking tools to China. KLA, a key player in semiconductor process control tools, is stepping up capital returns at a time when its share price is $1,516.84. The stock is up 4.5% over the...
